title: Brown belt grading for Karate Zen George
description: GEORGE NEWS - On Friday 26 April, Karate Zen...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - On Friday 26 April, Karate Zen had their Brown belt grading at their Honbu Dojo in Heather Park.

All three candidates did extremely well.

The grading panel for the grading was Renshi Llwelyn Rhoda (6th dan), Sensei Romeo Jury (4th dan), Sensei Mareon Ferndale (4th dan) and Sensei Faiz Toefy.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
